artPrompt: A towering tangle of mutant vines climbs a rusted water tower the full height of the wide frame, snapping toothed pods straining downward, sickly bioluminescent sap glistening along murky-green stems wreathed in drifting litter under a bruised stormy sky. One cold storm-light rakes the writhing mass from the dark, rust-red corrosion below, rendered as a moody oil painting — old-master chiaroscuro, visible impasto brushwork, deep shadow, warm varnished tones.
name: Mutant Snapping Vines
text:
Reach
Whenever Mutant Snapping Vines blocks a creature with flying, it deals 2 extra damage to that creature. (The fertilizer was banned in eleven states. The vines drank it anyway.)
flavorText: It crept up the water tower overnight. It is on the news. It is winning.
